parquet:columns.name: dates_datetime
parquet:columns.description: The primary reference date or start date for the measurement period.

parquet:columns.name: name
parquet:columns.description: Name of the geographical feature (e.g., ice shelf or glacier).

parquet:columns.name: geometry_union
parquet:columns.description: The unified geometric boundary of the feature, represented as a WKT (Well-Known Text) Polygon.

parquet:columns.name: geometry_intersect
parquet:columns.description: The intersection geometry of the feature representing the area of valid overlapping observations, in WKT format.

parquet:columns.name: time
parquet:columns.description: Timestamp of the specific observation, satellite pass, or interval midpoint.

parquet:columns.name: bm_monthly
parquet:columns.description: Estimated average basal melt rate over a monthly period.

parquet:columns.name: bm_monthly_errors
parquet:columns.description: Estimated uncertainty or error margin for the monthly basal melt calculation.

parquet:columns.name: bm_yearly_errors
parquet:columns.description: Estimated uncertainty or error margin for the yearly basal melt calculation.

parquet:columns.name: area_km2
parquet:columns.description: The calculated surface area of the defined geometry.

title: Time series of Antarctic ice shelf polygons representing both the union and intersection of the individual ice shelf masks and basal melt metrics
